{{Infobox character
| name = Aunt Naria
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Naria is [[Fury]]'s wife.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Naria is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Aunt Naria]] is not afraid of [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“What about Aunt Naria?” Fury’s wife was an Archlady, but she almost never fought anymore.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“What about Aunt Naria?” Fury’s wife was an Archlady, but she almost never fought anymore.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
